arts.ttl: Preview: Sevilla vs. Athletic Bilbao - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's La Liga clash between Sevilla and Athletic Bilbao, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Athletic Club star rewarded for form with international recall
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga outfit Athletic Club has been afforded a return to international duty with his home nation. The player in question? Iñaki…

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Nico Williams made Andrea Berta's top priority at Arsenal
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Mikel Arteta is pushing hard for Andrea Berta to sign Athletic Club winger Nico Williams . Sources with knowledge of the situation have informed us that Arteta is desperate to bring in the Athletic Club winger and wants Berta to utilise his Spanish connections to finally convince the player of a move to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: “Our fans deserve a win at the Sánchez Pizjuán” – Sevilla coach García Pimienta on his side’s poor form at home
arts.sum: It’s been an up-and-down few months for Sevilla recently. On the upside they are unbeaten in their last four games and are comfortable in mid-table, safe from the danger at…

arts.ttl: Arsenal face fresh rival competition in Nico Williams pursuit
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have joined Arsenal in the race to sign Athletic Club winger Nico Williams.
